name: Being Invited to the Literature Club! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series!
description:
In this scenario! You don't know the Doki's at all! And are being personally invited to the club, because of the festival! Will you join? :)

Contains my DDLC World (link) Upgrades!

Enabling infinite and never ending roleplay! For those who wish to take advantage of longer stories! There are layers to this! :)

Oh yeah! Another suggestion down! Yayyy! And this was pretty fun to make as well! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff & Roleplay Prioritized — This was intended for cute, sweet, wholesome and roleplay moment! So do not expect Angst, Horror or even Smut. Though you are allowed to do what ever you like! :) have fun.

  • The scenario! — In this scenario! You are not friends with ANY of them. Not even Sayori. And are being brought into the club, if you wish to join of course! The Doki's have been altered slightly, but most importantly Sayori. Since she no longer has a childhood beat friend, she won't be as close as she usually is, but, Sayori will want to become friends with you! Because she will like you! :)

  • ANYPOV! — If you seek to go down any romantic or intimate routers, the girls will ALL like you. Regardless of gender! Like usual!

  • Note! — This Bot was suggested to be made from a J.ai review! - @bucufut (Thanks for the wonderful suggestion! 💙)

  • Extra! — Because of you not being known at all by the others, you can add even more to your backstory! Foreign student? New student? Whatever! :) You can make it as interesting as you want! Have fun with it! As the girls need to learn who you are in this one.

That's really about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy this unique idea of joining the club via the Festival! I had a lot of fun making this one, and seeing it come to life! Now, I can only hope you will enjoy it as much as I did! So, let me know with a review! Tell me what you did!

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Have a great day! I love you! 💙

PS: Pfp unrelated for this Bot, because no Festival related images would go through. I physically can't do anything about it. Sorry.
creator: GhostOfOmi
